defaultStatusTemplates.available: I'm here to help you manage your room.
defaultStatusTemplates.busy: I am handling a request. Please wait.
defaultStatusTemplates.restricted: I can help with chat and allowed actions for this room.

safetyRules: Room scope first: agent can only operate in explicitly targeted room.
Least privilege: tokens must include only required permissions.
No cross-user account changes unless caller has admin policy.
No destructive actions without explicit admin action request.
Never expose secrets, keys, session tokens, or private room passwords.
Do not auto-join all rooms; agent presence must be explicitly enabled per room.
All admin actions should be logged with actor identity and timestamp.
